Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe -X utf8 -c "from mobile_reader.food_rules import FOOD_RULES; from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(r[5] for r in FOOD_RULES\); print\('총 규칙:', len\(FOOD_RULES\)\); print\('등급별:', dict\(c\)\); labels=set\(r[1] for r in FOOD_RULES\); print\('음식 라벨 종류:', len\(labels\)\); print\(sorted\(labels\)\)")

Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe -X utf8 -c "from mobile_reader.food_rules import FOOD_RULES; from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(r[5] for r in FOOD_RULES\); print\('총 규칙:', len\(FOOD_RULES\), '| 등급:', dict\(c\)\); labels=sorted\(set\(r[1] for r in FOOD_RULES\)\); print\('라벨', len\(labels\), '종:'\); print\(labels\)")

Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe -X utf8 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('drug_master.db'\); r=c.execute\(\\"SELECT kd_code,short_name,ingredient_code FROM drug_master WHERE kd_code LIKE 'KD%'\\"\).fetchall\(\); print\(f'Mock\(KD\) 약물: {len\(r\)}개'\); [print\(' ', x[0],x[1],x[2]\) for x in r]")

Bash(C:/ProgramData/anaconda3/python.exe -X utf8 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('drug_master.db'\); n=c.execute\(\\"DELETE FROM drug_master WHERE kd_code LIKE 'KD%'\\"\).rowcount; c.commit\(\); print\(f'Mock {n}개 삭제됨'\); tot=c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM drug_master'\).fetchone\(\)[0]; print\(f'남은 약물: {tot:,}개'\)")

PowerShell($os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Output "에디션: $\($os.Caption\)"; Write-Output "버전: $\($os.Version\)"; Write-Output "빌드: $\($os.BuildNumber\)"; Write-Output "아키텍처: $\($os.OSArchitecture\)")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== PowerShell의 python ==="; try { \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "python 없음" }; python -c "import sys; print\('exe:', sys.executable\)" 2>&1; Write-Output "=== conda 존재 여부 ==="; try { conda info --envs 2>&1 } catch { "conda 없음" }; Write-Output "=== CONDA 환경변수 ==="; $env:CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV; $env:CONDA_PREFIX)
Bash(python -c "import sys; print\('exe:', sys.executable\); print\('ver:', sys.version\)")
